summary: Stifel downgrade Feb 2026: Hold, PT cut from $540 to $392. BNP Paribas PT cut from $659 to $556 (Outperform). Cantor Fitzgerald PT cut from $590 to $502 (Overweight). Weiss downgrade Mar 2026: Buy to Hold. Most recent (Apr 28, 2026): 38 Buy, 5 Hold, 2 Strong Buy.
